feed.title: Ying Zhou
feed.subtitle: Geography PhD student at the University at Buffalo.

entry.title: For My Friends - A Masterpiece I Made for Them

link.title: For My Friends - A Masterpiece I Made for Them

entry.content:
The first post to remember the great “art” I made for my friends, they said:” Dare you post it!!!” Got it, they hope to be my first post.

Persons in this video:

  • Xinyi Yang (132206301114)
  • Ejing Chang
  • Ying Huang
  • Yin Yang
entry.summary: The first post to remember the great "art" I made for my friends, they said:" Dare you post it!!!" Got it, they hope to be my first post.
